description: Download endpoint joins a user path without containing it to the allowed root.

feature_artifacts.requirements.md:
# Requirements
Downloads must be restricted to the configured file root.
feature_artifacts.spec.md:
# Spec
Reject traversal and absolute path inputs.
feature_artifacts.plan.md:
# Plan
Validate resolved paths against ROOT.
